title: The Standard Experience
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack, with emphasis on the "Vanilla".
body:
![modpack_thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fa45b097935e6c3835422defd2888aacf6416e6_0.webp)
This is a Vanilla+ Modpack, with emphasis on the "Vanilla" rather than the "+".

The mods added in are meant to help with the aspects of the game I personally find to be annoying or break my immersion.

I handpicked the mods in order to help with prolonging the inevitable "2 week" phase with my friends.

It doesn't always keep us playing, but I have to say that this modpack has definitely kept us playing for longer.
